Contracting Authority: Land Niedersachsen, represented by IT.Niedersachsen (IT.N), Göttinger Chaussee 259, 30459 Hannover
Project Description:
- Framework agreement: time recording solution (software + services + HW terminals)
- On‑premise operation in Dataport RZ (Hamburg); IT.N operates the system
- Deliverables: installation, configuration, customization, maintenance, support, training, documentation
- Mandate- (tenant-) capable; web client (Edge/Firefox/Chrome/Safari; iOS/Android)
- No automatic legacy data migration
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 29.02.2024
- Answers published: 07.03.2024
- Info to non-awarded: 29.04.2024
- Expected award/contract: 10.05.2024
- Offer binding period until: 15.06.2024

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Subject: procurement of a tenant-capable time recording system incl. needed HW terminals, implementation and service
- Operating model: on‑premise at IT.N (Dataport RZ Hamburg); Windows Server 2022; VMware; DB: MS‑SQL (Standalone/Failover) or Oracle (Standalone/Failover/RAC/Standby)
- Client/frontend: web-based; supported browsers Edge, Firefox, Chrome or Safari; mobile browsers iOS/Android
- Security/IT‑S: AES encryption per BSI TR‑02102; TLS 1.2; SNMPv3; proxy support; NTP v3 (RFC 1305); logging of admin/remote; automatic admin lock after configurable failed logins; MS9 per BSI TR‑03126‑5 (eID interface)
- Terminals (HW): LAN (Ethernet) + RS232/422/485; central configuration; PoE or own PSU; tamper contact; sealed housing; offline buffering; battery state display; 24/7 booking on any terminal; display of weekday/time/date and booking/alerts
- Functional scope: capture start/end/pauses; overtime; absences (vacation/sickness etc.); flexible models (Gleitzeit/Teilzeit); home office capture; role & rights up to field level; mandantenfähig; cluster support (app/DB); safe rollback; German UI/messages; outputs printable and storable as PDF/A; TV‑L implementable
- Reporting/integration: evaluations by employee/department/project/time; interfaces desired: bidirectional to Kidicap and ERP (e.g., MS Dynamics)
- Project workflow: concept; test environment setup; documented tests; customizing; handbooks (user/admin, DE, editable + PDF/A); go‑live & knowledge transfer
- Service/SLAs: service hours Mo–Fr 08:00–17:00 (excl. holidays); reaction time for incidents 4 h (within service hours); hotline included; regular updates; maintenance included
- Training: in DE; groups—tech admins (max 5), User Help Desk (max 5), Key‑Users per authority (~5–10); UE=60 min; materials DE, searchable PDF/A; delivery ≥1 week before
- Delivery: hardware delivery deadline 21 working days (Mon–Fri, no holidays), subject to OEM availability
- Optional: Access control module; ISO 15408; DIN EN 60839‑11‑1 compliance
- Exclusion: no automatic migration of legacy data
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Estimated total call-off (max term): ca. 341.484,48 EUR; minimum: 140.191,97 EUR; maximum cap: 3.487.553,92 EUR (excl. VAT)
- License sizing (price sheet): 50 / 250 / 500 user packs; 1,090 users add-on modules total price to list
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- Operation: Dataport RZ (IT.N) Hamburg
- Deliveries/installation: sites across Lower Saxony; exceptions: Berlin/Brussels representations
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- BSI TR‑02102 (crypto); TLS 1.2; SNMPv3; NTP RFC 1305; BSI TR‑03126‑5 (MS9)
- BITV 2.0 (barrier-free IT); DIN EN ISO 9241; DIN 66.234; ISO/IEC 25000; DIN 66.290/1
- ISO 15408; DIN EN 60839‑11‑1 (access control)
- DGUV‑V3 manufacturer declaration on request; DIN 66399 (media destruction); EU RoHS
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Subcontractors permitted; name subs and scope in offer; Verpflichtungserklärung (Anlage II) required; later changes only with IT.N approval
- Bidding consortia allowed; joint and several liability; no double offers (solo + JV)
- Russia sanctions (Art. 5k EU 833/2014) declarations incl. subs >10% of contract
- Security vetting per Nds. SÜG for security-sensitive work (lead time ≥8 weeks)
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Electronic submission via vergabe.niedersachsen.de using Desktop-Bietertool; text form (§126b BGB); one offer only; DE language
- End-to-end encryption; electronic timestamp; 4‑eyes opening after deadline
- Bidder Q&A via platform using Formblatt_Bieterfragen; answers become part of the docs

Award Criteria:
- Award to most economically advantageous offer per §58 VgV/§127 GWB; simple ratio method: Z = L / P
- L (performance points): sum of criterion scores (0–10 for B‑criteria) × weights per Bewertungsmatrix/Kriterienkatalog
- P (price): PGesamt = PLizenz + PHardware + PUmsetzungsvorgehen + PSystemservice + PSchulung + PUnterstützungsleistung (per Preisblatt)
- KO criteria (must): broad compliance with LB ch. 2–5 (architecture, HW, security, functionality), updates, support/hotline, logging (“Wer hat wann was geändert?”), online processing, corrections, vacation/illness rules, scalability, remote maintenance, self‑service basics
- Scored examples (weights/examples):
  - Schnittstellen (Kidicap/ERP): up to 5 pts, high weight (100)
  - Dialog-Durchgriffe/Favoriten: up to 5 pts each, weight 100
  - Cluster/LDAP/browser w/o install: Standard=full, Konfig.=0.8, Projektleistung=0.5
  - Project approach (6.1–6.4), org/communication, trainings: up to 5 pts each, weight 100
